task_completion.description: Verify the transcription_assistant directory was created in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, terminal, or editor tree shows the folder 'transcription_assistant' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user'.

task_completion.description: Verify transcription.py and transcription.talon were created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The files 'transcription.py' and 'transcription.talon' are visible inside the 'transcription_assistant' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify transcription.py contains an action for the speaker label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in transcription.py shows a function/action that takes text, converts it to uppercase, wraps it in brackets, and appends a colon and space (e.g., `f'[{text.upper()}]: '` or similar string formatting logic).

task_completion.description: Verify transcription.py contains actions for timecodes and media toggling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in transcription.py shows functions/actions to insert a timecode formatted as '[HH:MM:SS]' and another action to toggle media playback followed by inserting a timecode.

task_completion.description: Verify transcription.py contains an action to rewind audio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in transcription.py shows a function/action that executes a rewind or skip back command exactly five times (e.g., using a loop of 5 or repeating the action 5 times).

task_completion.description: Verify transcription.talon maps the required voice commands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code in transcription.talon shows the exact voice commands 'speaker <user.text>$', 'mark time', 'halt and mark', and 'audio rewind' mapped to their corresponding actions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a code editor or standard file writing tools to create the scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using an editor (like VS Code, Notepad, Vim) or terminal commands to write the code, rather than files appearing without interaction.

integrity.description: Verify the agent worked in the exact specified directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths shown in the editor or terminal exactly match 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\transcription_assistant'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't add extra unrequested voice commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The transcription.talon file only contains the requested voice commands and doesn't include additional unrelated commands not mentioned in the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\transcription_assistant. Required files: transcription.py and transcription.talon.
